course_outcomes.LO1: Explain the mathematical foundations of neural networks including linear algebra, calculus, and probability.
course_outcomes.LO2: Design and implement feedforward, convolutional, and recurrent neural network architectures.
course_outcomes.LO3: Train deep learning models using gradient-based optimization, regularization, and hyperparameter tuning.
course_outcomes.LO4: Analyze and debug model behavior using loss curves, validation metrics, and ablation studies.
course_outcomes.LO5: Apply deep learning to real-world tasks including image classification, sequence modeling, and language understanding.
course_outcomes.LO6: Evaluate model performance critically and compare architectures using appropriate metrics.
course_outcomes.LO7: Communicate experimental methodology, results, and limitations clearly in written reports.

program_outcomes.SO1: Analyze a complex computing problem and apply principles of computing and other relevant disciplines to identify solutions.
program_outcomes.SO2: Design, implement, and evaluate a computing-based solution to meet a given set of computing requirements.
program_outcomes.SO3: Communicate effectively in a variety of professional contexts.
program_outcomes.SO6: Apply computer science theory and software development fundamentals to produce computing-based solutions.
